visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with black braided hair, wearing a white oversized hoodie and a brown aviator hat with white fur lining, is squatting on a thick layer of snow. She is holding a red plastic duck-shaped snowball maker and pressing it into the snow with a wide, joyful smile. The background features a large dark wood log cabin and a red safety fence under bright, natural daylight. (2) She opens the tool to reveal a perfectly formed round snowball. She picks it up with her bare hand and shows it to the camera before placing it on the snow surface. (3) She then takes a smaller duck-shaped snowball and carefully places it on top of the round one, creating a snow sculpture. She continues to smile brightly and looks directly at the lens. (4) The camera shot tightens as she holds the completed duck-on-ball snow sculpture in her palm, presenting it as if it were a finished product or snack. (5) There is a sudden, fast camera tilt upwards, showing bare winter tree branches and a bright, overcast white sky before the video cuts.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 我的挫冰 (2) [Subtitle]: 刚刚做了 (3) [Subtitle]: 鸭子 (4) [Subtitle]: 这个鸭子 (5) [Subtitle]: 嘿

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator interacting with snow.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair in two braids, wearing a thick white hooded sweatshirt, beige pants, and a brown/white winter pilot hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A rustic dark-colored log building serves as the primary backdrop, with a red mesh safety net visible behind a pile of white snow.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A cheerful, high-pitched female voice speaks over an upbeat electronic dance track with a prominent synthesized bassline and a steady 4/4 drum beat. The acoustic environment is clean with minimal wind noise. (2) A sharp 'bubble pop' sound effect triggers as she reveals the first snowball, coinciding with her enthusiastic speech. (3) The music continues with high-frequency pluck sounds as she names the 'duck' (yazi), her voice showing high valence and excitement. (4) A bell-like 'ding' SFX sounds as the final snow figure is displayed, emphasizing the result. (5) A final energetic shout 'Hey!' occurs as the audio track ends abruptly alongside a visual transition.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video captures a playful winter moment where the creator uses a snowball maker to create a cute duck-shaped snow sculpture. It aims to share a sense of joy and leisure at a winter travel destination.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video exhibits high social-media production value with synchronized sound effects and bright, natural aesthetics, characteristic of short-form travel vlogs.
